Enq. text:
Hello! 

My name is Audrey, and I am the Summer Camp Director at Girl Scouts Western Oklahoma. We know someone who used Funky Monkey to do a foam party at a school event, and we are interested in getting more information about how it works. 

We will be hosting week-long summer camp programs from June1-26 in Marlow, OK, and July 8-August 2 in OKC, OK, and we love the idea of having a foam party weekly. I know it's a crazy time of year with the holiday approaching, but if possible, I'd like to schedule some time to meet or chat more about logistics and the process itself, as well as pricing and whether you offer discounted rates for nonprofits.

You can reach me via email at aparnell@gswestok.org or by phone at (405) 442-0696.

Thanks for your time! We look forward to hearing from you.


Best,
Audrey Parnell
Summer Camp Director
Girl Scouts Western Oklahoma

Our Summer Reading Program THEME is "Color Your World" at the Cushing Public Library. It spans a variety of forms of art. We would love a magic show that encompasses color and art if possible. Magic itself is a form of art and any amazing magic tricks would be more than enough. It is geared for families. Our auditorium seats around 75 people. We have a stage for performances. Michael Hanes is the Library Director. Julie Green is the Children's Librarian in charge of our Summer Reading Program.
